title: Strategy & Transformation
description: Support for emerging priorities, strategic planning efforts, new initiatives, and organizational shifts that need structure, synthesis, and a clear path forward.

title: Digital Health & AI Readiness
description: Helping healthcare teams translate AI and digital health questions into practical strategy, education, governance, and member-facing resources.

title: Stakeholder Alignment & Execution
description: Designing the working structure, communications, decision points, and deliverables needed to move cross-functional or volunteer-driven work forward.

title: Grants & Program Development
description: Turning early ideas into fundable concepts, partner narratives, program plans, and proposal-ready materials.
